title: Potsdamer Platz Berlin - Quick Summary
items: **Potsdamer Platz Berlin is worth visiting if you read it as a before-and-after site**, not just as a shopping square.
**The strongest first stop is the Wall trace on the ground.** Look down before you look up at the towers.
**Allow 20 minutes for the quick version**, 45 minutes for a proper loop, or 75 minutes if you add Panoramapunkt or Kulturforum.
**Do not expect an old-town feeling.** The point is the opposite: destruction, border strip, empty space and post-1990 rebuilding in one place.
**Sony Center and the modern quarter are best as architecture stops**, not as the whole reason to come.
**Pair it with Brandenburg Gate, Topography of Terror or the Berlin Wall route** if you want the history to connect.
